overview.description: The iShares Short Duration High Yield Muni Active ETF (SHYM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is actively managed to provide exposure to primarily high-yield US municipal bonds that are exempt from federal income tax. SHYM was launched on Mar 16, 2021 and is issued by BlackRock.
